scripts.setup:watnot: cd watnot && npm install && npm run build
scripts.annotate: wasmtime --dir . watnot/build/watnot.wasm build/wasmgpt.wasm.map build/wasmgpt.wat build/wasmgpt.offsets.json src/index.ts src/lexer.ts src/vocabulary.ts src/bpe.ts > build/wasmgpt.annotated.wat
scripts.corpus: npm run build && npm run wat && npm run annotate
scripts.train:bpe: npm run corpus && npm run build:train-bpe && wasmtime --dir . build/train-bpe.wasm build/wasmgpt.annotated.wat
scripts.train: npm run build:train && wasmtime --dir . build/train.wasm build/wasmgpt.annotated.wat build/merges.sexp
scripts.infer: npm run build:infer && wasmtime --dir . build/infer.wasm build/vocab.sexp
